// Preamble line that has no FINDING header — should not crash the parser.
some stray output from an upstream stage

FINDING-but-malformed: services/api/src/foo.ts
not-a-real-block: 12

FINDING: services/api/src/foo.ts:7:SHOULD-FIX
WHAT: Real finding mixed in after garbage.
EVIDENCE: foo.ts:7
IMPACT: low
OPTIONS:
1. Fix it.
UNVERIFIABLE: no
